hook.text: REAL MADRID STEP BACK FROM FERNANDES RACE

beats.text: MADRID WILL NOT MAKE A FORMAL APPROACH FOR HIM
THE TIMES: FERNANDES NOW SEEMS SET TO JOIN UNITED
WEST HAM STILL DEMAND £85M FOR THE MIDFIELDER

caption: The Mateus Fernandes race just cleared. The Times reports Real Madrid have confirmed they will NOT make a formal approach — the West Ham midfielder now seems set to join Manchester United. West Ham still want £85m, but with Madrid out of the picture, Carrick's midfield target is getting closer. Window is open. Do you want to see this done? 🔴 REPORTED — per The Times / Gary Jacob. #mufc #manutd #premierleague #football #transfernews #transferwindow
